productDisplayName: Fila Men Calcio Red Sports Shoes
description: Get ready to score goals with these fila men's soccer cleats. The lightweight structure enables better ball control. Ultra-durable and lightweight, these cleats are designed for quick moves on the field to enhance performance.UpperSynthetic leather upper for a comfortable, durable FitCentral lacing system for an expanded ball control areaExtended tongue fold-able over the lacing systemPadded insoleMidsoleEVA sockliner for cushioning and to help reduce stud pressureOutsoleLightweight outsole with optimized cleat placement for traction, stability and durabilityDurable cleats for use on short grass fields that may be slightly wet, but rarely muddyDurable TPU plate with strategically placed cleats that grip the ground and deliver reliable stabilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
